creator: terry@sucked-in.com
text:
Navigate to http://www.freebsd.org/news/status/ and you will see as one of the first headings on that page the following text:

Next submission due: January 6, 2007

This should most likely read:

Next submission due: January 6, 2008

I know it is a small thing but it obviously needs to be changed, it is a new year after all ;o)

Fix: 

Change text to read:

Next submission due: January 6, 2008

or whenever the actual date is in 2008.
How-To-Repeat: Navigate to http://www.freebsd.org/news/status/
